Azure OpenAI REST API Reference

Page last updated: 2026-03-21

API Versions:
- Control Plane Latest GA: 2025-06-01
- Control Plane Latest Preview: 2025-07-01-preview
- Data Plane GA: v1
- Data Plane Preview: v1 preview
- Inference (GA): 2024-10-21

Core Endpoints:
- Chat Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/chat/completions (streaming, tool calling, parallel execution, log probs, JSON mode, structured outputs, vision)
- Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/completions
- Embeddings: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/embeddings (configurable dimensions, float/base64 encoding)
- Audio Transcriptions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/transcriptions (multiple formats: json, verbose_json, text, vtt, srt)
- Audio Translations: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/translations
- Image Generation: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/images/generations (DALL-E, quality standard/hd, style vivid/natural)

Chat Extensions (On Your Data):
- Azure Search (vector, semantic, hybrid query types, field mapping, strictness, top_n_documents)
- Azure Cosmos DB (MongoDB vCore, vector search, embedding dependency)

Authentication: API Key (api-key header), Microsoft Entra ID (Bearer token), system/user-assigned managed identities

Content Filtering: Sexual, Violence, Hate, Self-harm, Profanity, Jailbreak, Protected material (text/code with citations)
- Severity levels: safe, low, medium, high
- Custom blocklist support

Advanced Features:
- Parallel tool calls (up to 128 functions, enabled by default)
- Structured outputs (JSON Schema) — compatible with GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-3.5 Turbo 1106+
- Seed parameter (Beta) for deterministic outputs
- Log probabilities (logprobs + top_logprobs)
- Response streaming (SSE, data: [DONE] delimiter)
- Vision support (image URL with detail: auto/low/high)
- max_completion_tokens (replaces max_tokens for newer models)
- system_fingerprint for backend reproducibility
- logit_bias for token-level probability modification

Note: New preview inference API available — see API lifecycle guide for details.
Note: Data Plane GA version now listed as "v1" (previously "2024-10-21" still listed for inference GA).

Updated: 2026-04-01
